releaseApprovalMessage: Approve kano-agent-backlog-skill Release/Publish? Confirm tag, artifacts, docs, and publish plan before proceeding.
windowsTestCommand: pixi run python -m pip install -e .[dev] build && pixi run python -m pytest --tb=short -q --ignore=./tests/performance_utils.py --ignore=./tests/test_tokenizer_chunking_performance.py --junitxml artifacts/reports/windows/junit-pytest.xml --cov=src/python --cov-report xml:artifacts/reports/windows/cobertura-pytest.xml && bash src/shell/test/native-test.sh
windowsValidateCommand: bash src/shell/test/lint.sh && pixi run python -m pip install -e .[dev] build && pixi run python -m build --sdist --wheel --outdir dist-test && bash src/shell/docs/build-and-deploy.sh --ci
windowsExportCommand: pixi run python -m pip install -e .[dev] build && pixi run python -m build --sdist --wheel --outdir dist-test
